    $value[0]['faq_desc']
    <p>Anda dipersilakan untuk menghabiskan waktu sesuai keinginan di BXSea. Biasanya, kunjungan Anda akan berlangsung sekitar 2 jam tergantung pada kecepatan Anda mengelilingi atraksi. Pintu masuk terakhir 1 jam sebelum kami tutup.</p>

    $value[0]['faq_desc_en']
    <p>You are welcome to spend as much time as you wish at BXSea. Usually, your visit will last about 2 hours depending on your speed around the attractions. Last entrance 1 hours before we closed.</p>

    faq_title => string (63) "Saya ingin membatalkan tiket saya. Apa yang harus saya lakukan?"

    faq_desc => string (290) "<p>Mohon maaf, tiket yang sudah dibeli tidak dapat dibatalkan atau diuangkan...
    $value[4]['faq_desc']
    <p>Mohon maaf, tiket yang sudah dibeli tidak dapat dibatalkan atau diuangkan kembali (refund). Namun, Anda dapat mengubah tanggal kedatangan maksimal 3 hari sejak waktu pembelian tiket. Jika sudah melewati batas waktu tersebut, tanggal tidak dapat diubah, dibatalkan, atau dikembalikan.</p>
    faq_desc_en => string (241) "<p>Unfortunately, tickets cannot be canceled or refunded. However, you can c...
    $value[4]['faq_desc_en']
    <p>Unfortunately, tickets cannot be canceled or refunded. However, you can change your arrival date a maximum of 3 days from the time you purchase your ticket. If it is past that date, you may not change the date, cancel it or return it.</p>
    faq_category => string (5) "other"

    faq_desc => string (186) "<p>Setelah membeli tiket secara online, Anda akan menerima barcode. Saat tib...
    $value[5]['faq_desc']
    <p>Setelah membeli tiket secara online, Anda akan menerima barcode. Saat tiba di BXSea, silakan pindai barcode tersebut di kiosk untuk mendapatkan tiket masuk atau gelang tiket Anda.</p>
    faq_desc_en => string (177) "<p>When purchasing tickets online, you will receive a barcode. When you arri...
    $value[5]['faq_desc_en']
    <p>When purchasing tickets online, you will receive a barcode. When you arrive at BXSea, please scan the barcode at the kiosk to get your entrance ticket / ticket wristband.</p>

    faq_title => string (74) "Saya salah memilih tanggal saat membeli tiket. Bagaimana cara mengubahnya?"

    faq_title_en => string (70) "I chose the wrong date when purchasing my ticket. How can I change it?"

    faq_desc => string (325) "<p>Tentu, Anda dapat mengubah tanggal kunjungan dengan menghubungi tim BXSea...
    $value[6]['faq_desc']
    <p>Tentu, Anda dapat mengubah tanggal kunjungan dengan menghubungi tim BXSea selambat-lambatnya pada tanggal kedatangan yang salah tersebut. Mohon maaf, kami tidak dapat melakukan perubahan apa pun jika tanggal tersebut telah terlewati. Perubahan tanggal hanya diperbolehkan maksimal 3 hari dari tanggal awal yang keliru.</p>
    faq_desc_en => string (285) "<p>Certainly, you can amend your arrival date by contacting the BXSea team n...
    $value[6]['faq_desc_en']
    <p>Certainly, you can amend your arrival date by contacting the BXSea team no later than the incorrect arrival date. If it surpasses that date, we are unable to make any changes ---. You are only allowed to change the arrival date up to a maximum of 3 days from the incorrect date.</p>
    faq_category => string (5) "other"

    $value[8]['faq_title_en']
    faq_desc => string (318) "<p>Layanan kursi roda bagi lansia atau pengunjung disabilitas tersedia di BX...
    $value[8]['faq_desc']
    <p>Layanan kursi roda bagi lansia atau pengunjung disabilitas tersedia di BXSea tanpa dikenakan biaya. Silakan hubungi pusat informasi di BXSea untuk bantuan lebih lanjut. Harap diperhatikan bahwa jumlah kursi roda yang tersedia terbatas dan akan diberikan berdasarkan urutan kedatangan (first-come, first-served).</p>
    faq_desc_en => string (307) "<p>Wheelchair service for elderly or disabled guests is available at BXSea w...
    $value[8]['faq_desc_en']
    <p>Wheelchair service for elderly or disabled guests is available at BXSea without charge. Please contact the information centre at BXSea for more information. Please note that there is a limited number of wheelchairs available for rent, which will be provided on a first-come, first-served basis. </p>

    faq_desc => string (293) "<p>Tentu saja, namun mohon diperhatikan bahwa kami membatasi jumlah kereta b...
    $value[9]['faq_desc']
    <p>Tentu saja, namun mohon diperhatikan bahwa kami membatasi jumlah kereta bayi (stroller) atau kursi roda yang aktif di dalam akuarium demi menjaga keamanan pengunjung dan kelancaran arus jalan. Jika kuota telah terpenuhi saat Anda tiba, Anda dipersilakan untuk masuk pada jam berikutnya.</p>
    faq_desc_en => string (256) "<p>Yes, but please note that we have a limit to the number of strollers or w...
    $value[9]['faq_desc_en']
    <p>Yes, but please note that we have a limit to the number of strollers or wheelchairs active in the oceanarium to maintain guest safety and smooth traffic flow. If you come and the limit has been reached, you are welcome to come at the next hour.</p>
    faq_category => string (8) "facility"
    $value[9]['faq_category']
